hotel_name: Khách sạn Hanoi Little (Hanoi Little Hotel)

reviews.title: UNABLE TO LOCATE!!!
reviews.text: This freakin' hotel is nowhere to be found in hanoi. Even the grab drivers can't find it, so we end up being dropped off in a different hotel. I think this hotel is a SCAM since they charge you immediately upon booking. People, please don't book here because it will be a waste of money. SCAMMERS ARE EVERYWHERE!!!

reviews.title: Total disappointment
reviews.text:
Me and my gf came at 5am to the hotel for check in, and there was nobody in the reception to accommodate us, no body at all!
We stayed there outside of the hotel for hours, trying to call them and reach the owner trough the chat, but nobody answer us and when we contacted with the property, they read our message and never respond!
So me and my girlfriend went to another hotel because we were desperate!
Very disappointed, and terrible service!!:(
Not recommended at all!

reviews.title: Filthy
reviews.text: I booked this property for 3 days. When I arrived at the property. I looked at the room and realized I could never stay there. I requested a refund and they declined. I contacted Agoda. They did nothing. Please be careful this is not a place you will want to stay. It doesn't even deserve one star.

reviews.title: Fake hotel
reviews.text: While booking hotel pictures are totally different and reality is totally different

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
if you’re looking for a good hotel. not this one!! Save your money and find another good hotel.

 Smelly room, receptionist will not assist you very well.  Overall not a good hotel to stay longer.

reviews.title: Avoid
reviews.text: Refrigerator, hot water, soap and TV did not work. Staff fixed the hot water and got us some soap.

reviews.title: Pathetic service and room
reviews.text: Cleanliness no done , broken floor, stinky linen , no lift

reviews.title: Unsatisfied customer
reviews.text:
We booked this hotel on Agoda because it seemed nice and reasonable, especially since our flight to Hanoi was delayed. When we arrived at the address listed, the building was empty and under renovation, it didn’t look like a hotel at all. I thought we had been scammed.

Luckily, our driver kindly called the hotel for us late at night, and someone at the hotel clarified that the address had changed. When we finally reached the correct location, the website stated they offered 24-hour check-in, but the lights were off and the staff had to be woken up.

The room we received was nothing like the pictures online. Instead of a spacious, neat, well-kept room, it was cramped, smelled unpleasant, and was completely different from what was advertised. Although the bed looked fine, the overall stay was disappointing.

I'm writing this review to warn other travelers, and I hope the owner takes steps to improve the hotel and their services.

reviews.title: Joke
reviews.text: When I got here, they were full so took me to another building 1/2 mile away.  The room was full of cockroaches and trash. I told them I needed a refund then they refused and took me to another room slightly less disgusting.  Maybe if you don't stay in their overflow shack it would be a lovely visit but I wouldn't know.

reviews.title: Not recommend
reviews.text: Poor services

reviews.title: Got 6 mosquito bites
reviews.text: Not clean

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Very dirty hotel . I was extremely disappointed with my stay. Thank god only 1 night but The room smelled bad as soon as I walked in, and it was clearly not cleaned properly. The towels looked used and were not fresh at all. Even worse, the bed sheets appeared to be the same ones used by previous guests — dirty and unhygienic.

This is completely unacceptable for any hotel, especially considering basic cleanliness is the bare minimum. I would not recommend staying here unless cleanliness standards improve significantly

reviews.title: Very poor
reviews.text: Cleanliness  is very poor. Its like a boarding house. The room is very smelly and dirty. The water glass for drinking looks like not been cleaned for months. And the location very hard to locate. Took us 45 minutes to see the hotel.

reviews.title: WORST  HOTEL I HAVE EVER STAYED
reviews.text: THE ROOM SIZE IS TOO SMALL , BATH ROOM IS CONSTRUCTED  IN SIDE THE ROOM WITH GLASS WALL WHICH HAS NOT ONLY  REDUCED THE SIZE OF THE ROOM BUT ALSO  HAS PROVIDED BAD SMELL INSIDE THE ROOM.

reviews.title: Room smell and cleaning services are bad.
reviews.text: Room cleaning services are bad. It is not cost effective. But location is accessible to old town and ho Hoan Kiem lake.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: they moved us in the other hotel very dusty and a lot of noice but staffs are helpful because they are the one who put our luggage up since they dont have elevator. Place is near at the night market.

reviews.title: Not for me
reviews.text: No lift with room on the first floor , room was not so clean and the bed was hard

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: this was not at all what we expected from the photos

reviews.title: not what it looks like
reviews.text: these pictures on the website don't look like the rooms at all. the hotel is in a place that drivers cannot go to. so if you are with luggage, don't come here. you have to walk to get here, it's in a side street. the hotel also has no elevator. it was dirty in the room with lots of stains and dust on the towels and bedsheets. I question if it was even cleaned before I came. thank god I only stayed one night for my stopover flight so I forced myself to deal with it but felt itchy and horrible all over. but you can get a lot better places for the same price than this. don't be tempted

reviews.title: Total dump place
reviews.text: Nothing will be good here except for the location. The rest? Pure hell. Go have your money spent somewhere else.

reviews.title: Never ever been cleaned
reviews.text: The room was so dusty and dirty within a few hours I was having an allergic reaction to everything. There were layers of dust all over every surface and some left over garbage on the sink from the previous guests. I had to move to a different place after a few nights because I was so sick. 0/10

reviews.title: Review
reviews.text: The room and bed linen is a bit dusty. Provided glassware looks like it hasnt been cleaned for quite sometime.

reviews.title: No elevator
reviews.text: i just stay in this hotel for 1 night and it’s too bad i can even come back. Small stair with no elevator :<

reviews.title: Great Location, but Dirty and Uncomfortable Experience
reviews.text:
The location of the hotel is very good, which is the only positive point. Unfortunately, the room was dirty, with visible mould, and the carpeted floor made it feel even more unclean. There was construction in the building opposite our room, and the workers could see directly into our window, so we had to keep the curtains closed at all times.
Additionally, we heard another guest crying because she lost her money, even though it was kept inside her hotel room, which made us feel unsafe. Overall, the experience was disappointing.

reviews.title: Room was filthy
reviews.text: The room was filthy and right next door to major construction. The pictures are extremely deceiving. We were very disappointed.

reviews.title: Left to fall apart
reviews.text:
This is a place where nobody cares.

When I check in tired as a new guest, I don't want to have to ask for basic things that should just be clean and working. It's not my job, it's the hotel's. 
The staff creates an atmosphere of not wanting to be bothered. 

Staircase has huge layers of dust that have not been cleaned for months.
Broken things fixed half heartedly or not at all.
The sink in my bathroom was half falling off the wall. Balcony is dirty. The room was small, just enough space to walk around the bed. furniture unpractical, bathroom ventilation extremely loud (cannot be switched off separately to the light). No hot water (there is a switch for it, but makes no difference).

Receptionists were all uninterested in the guests, not helpful (telling me to Google my questions by myself as first answer). Very eager to get back to their social media on their phones.

The location is nice, a small alley with locals coming for lunch next door.
The balcony view was nice.
The room itself was clean enough.
There was no housekeeping during stay, no refill of water.

This is obviously a place that is just left to generate money without any care or investment.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: If it costs under $***day.

reviews.title: Bed bugs
reviews.text:
This place is not clean at all, infested with bed bugs. If you do stay here check the mattress and protecter thoroughly as I’m unsure if this problem will be dealt with after I reported it. 

Shower drain blocked quickly, since the bathroom is a wet room this means the whole floor floods. 

Street is very noisy, currently construction work next door starts at 7am. WiFi is weak and sometimes drops out completely. 

Staff were nice and helpful, quick to respond to questions prior to arrival.

reviews.title: Stay for one day okay
reviews.text:
Staircase very worst
No lift . If you got 4th or 5th will be worst

reviews.title: CHEAP BUT NOT USER FRIENDLY
reviews.text: Cheap but not user friendly

reviews.title: No Lift be ready for Hiking 🥾🥾
reviews.text: Value for money 💰 good location but Cleaning on daily basis or at least weekly basis during your stay wasn't there. If you carry luggage or thought of buying luggage 🧳 a definite no no unless you are masculine enough to carry your luggage through narrow steps

reviews.title: Cleaning
reviews.text: There was no housekeeping every day. No towels, no water, and the floors were dirty with hair and other things. The towels weren’t clean, and there were no blankets provided. There was only one person who could write in English, but they were using Agoda to communicate with customers and weren’t connected with the other staff. The situation was frustrating, and everything felt messy and unorganized.

reviews.title: The photos doesn't look the actual room
reviews.text: The hotel is so old. No elevator. The sheet look dirty. And the bathroom stink.

reviews.title: Great bang for buck
reviews.text: Decent hotel with accommodating staff and affordable options

reviews.title: It's alright
reviews.text: Good value for money, wouldn't stay here for more than one or two nights but the location is great.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: I was on the 5th floor so it was a lot of stairs to get to my room, but the bed was comfortable and the aircon was amazing. Very good location too

reviews.title: A good budget hotel
reviews.text:
The Hanoi Adela is a good budget hotel. It's great value for money, but you must be aware that the beds are to the hard side, and there is no breakfast available. It seems more like a place you would just use for sleeping in, and then get out. It's more suited for young travelers and backpackers than old people or families. 

For those in doubt about what to choose and what to trust in reviews, if you want service on a high level with 5/5 in every way, yet for a low price, I will recommend looking for the La Siesta Classic Hotel, located in the same area. If you are looking for a place to sleep and keep the budget down, then the Adela is more than capable.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Excellent location! Close to everything in the heart of the old quarter but quiet

reviews.title: The cost performance is good.
reviews.text: Even though it's Monday, there are many expensive places, so I came to a place with affordable accommodation. There's no elevator, so I have to walk to the fifth floor, but it has a refrigerator, kettle, and hairdryer. The water flow is good, and it was nice. Since we only need a place to sleep, the bed is comfortable too.

reviews.title: Great value, clean, and roomy
reviews.text: This place is great for it's value. This is no elevator, however the facility makes up for it with it's central location, cleanliness, and friendly staff. The rooms are roomy, there is AC, and the room is also clean. I would stay here again 🙂

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.text: Good place to stay if you want a private room on a budget

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Not too bad for the price

reviews.title: Not bad for the price.
reviews.text:
Excellent location in Old town. Fast walk to pretty much everything. Staff was friendly and courteous. 

Water did not get hot in the two nights/3 days I was there, it was always like warm or on the colder side. There was construction right across the street (which is no fault of the hotel) so it was very loud, I was not able to sleep in at all. There is no elevator so if you have a heavy pack or bag, be prepared to walk up. I was on the 5th floor with a 50lb pack so it was definitely not ideal. 

Other than that, the room was clean and the staff were more than happy to help with whatever they could!

reviews.title: One night
reviews.text:
Location wise
Affordable
Staff are also nice
Accessible and convenient

reviews.title: Hanoi Old Quarter
reviews.text: Hotels in the Old Quarter of Hanoi, convenient transportation to the Central Areas, suitable for guests who want to stay in the center of Hanoi at budget-friendly prices.

reviews.title: So-so.
reviews.text: The advantages are a good location, close to Hoan Kiem Lake, and it's relatively clean. The downside is that there is no elevator, so it can be quite exhausting if staying on a higher floor. If someone is living alone and wants to save money, it can still be a reasonable place to stay.

reviews.title: Great location and money's value
reviews.text: The rooms are a little sketchy but charming! Had a room with balcony, and we really enjoyed it. The aircondition we had was not super powerful and did take some time to cool the room but when it was done, it was great. The beds are hard though! So if you wish for a soft or medium madras, this is NOT it. But clean and it has what it needs to. WiFi, a bed, a shower, a sink and a toilet (even a little tv). But charm more than anything.

reviews.title: Place is OK
reviews.text: There was a stain on the duvet, the shower gel was empty even I already told them to fill it up. Best location cuz you are in the middle of it

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Great value for the price!

reviews.text: The air conditioning is really good, and the location is very convenient since it’s close to many places. The staff are also friendly, so everything feels comfortable and easy. Everything was great, but there’s no elevator.

reviews.title: If not a hostel, then here.
reviews.text: I think it’s tough for people coming with suitcases because there’s no elevator, but backpackers should be able to reach it without feeling particularly burdened. It was great that they lent us two bath towels for free. There are many hotels with similar names, so make sure you don’t go to the wrong place!

reviews.title: Nice hotel in the Old Quarter

reviews.title: Very good value for the money

reviews.title: Tourist
reviews.text:
I had a really good stay here! The hotel is in a great location, making it easy to get around and explore the area. Despite being very affordable, it was comfortable and convenient, which made it an excellent value for the price.

If you’re looking for a place that’s budget-friendly but still gives you easy access to the main spots, this hotel is a perfect choice. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Worth renting
reviews.text: Convenient location. Close to the center, can walk there. Staff are enthusiastic and friendly. 10 points.

reviews.title: Wicked place clean and right in the central
reviews.text: The best room I have been in hanoi at a very good price 👌 staff are brilliant and location is brilliant price is so good 👍 thanks again guy

reviews.text: My room is on the 4th floor. There is no elevator but I don't mind. The room is just nice. Comfy bed and working water heater is all I need. I slept well.

reviews.text: Everything is good, especially the location right in the old quarter and close to good restaurants. The room is narrow (which is reasonable given it's in the old quarter) but has all the necessary amenities. I will come back again if I travel next time.

La boulloire a du moisi dessus et le frigo sent très mauvais et il est sale.  La literie était humide..  personne ne parle anglais.  A éviter même pour 1 court séjour et même s'il est bien situé.

Nous avons dormi avec nos vêtements sur l'autre lit. 
Verres terriblement sale, moisissure dans la douche.  Heureusement mo

reviews.title: Une nuit pas plus
reviews.text:
Nous avons passé une nuit de transit dans cet hôtel 
C’était suffisant pour une nuit et vraiment pas cher 10euros mais pas propre et la rue est sombre du coup il n’y a pas de lumière naturelle 
Donc parfait pour une nuit mais pas plus

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Hôtel pas cher il ne faut pas s'attendre à avoir du luxe , rapport qualité prix correct

Grande chambre un peu vieillot mais suffisant tv frigo placard 
Toilette et douche privée 
Balconvue ruelle  là vue vous ne verrez pas de couché du soleil  3 grandes fenêtres 
Pour Hanoi  je vous conseille

reviews.title: Bon séjour
reviews.text: Si vous souhaitez réserver une chambre d’hôtel au cœur de la vieille ville d’Hanoi n’hésitez pas. Le rapport qualité prix est bon, l’emplacement est super et le personnel est très accueillant et à l’écoute. La dame d’accueil m’a aidé à chercher un taxi en pleine nuit à la dernière minute pour rejoindre mon vol.

reviews.title: Parfait !!!
reviews.text:
J’ai réservé pour 1 nuit. J’y suis restée 1 semaine. 

Propre (draps, sol, sdb…) calme, eau chaude, pression, AC au top, sèche cheveux, serviettes…

Emplacement parfait au fond d’une petite rue perpendiculaire à une grosse rue animée. Aucun bruit le matin ni le soir. 

ATM sans frais juste à côté. 

Petit café juste en bas de l’immeuble. 

Personnel très sympathique et réactif. 

Prix très correct ! 

Je recommande à 100%

reviews.title: did not expect much
reviews.text:
just some basic hygiene & comfort should be possible to provide.
mold in bath compartment, tiny room, dirt in every corner & behind bed & dusty cupboard.
staff helped to bring 1 of 2 suitcases up to the 4th floor :)
we paid more for a second night before we checked out early.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Das Personal schlief als ich selbst von einer Nachtbusfahrt kam. Leidervwar die Toilette nicht noch vom Vorgast angepieselt....was ich warscheinlich nicht hier erwähnt hätte aber das Bettzeug roch leider auch nach dem Vorgast. Ich bin in der Regel nicht kleinlich aber beim Bettzeug super empfindlich. Wer hier schlafen will sollte das überprüfen u das Bettzeug wechseln lassen. Das haben sie auch gemacht ohne das es ein Problem gab. Personal ist freundlich.

reviews.title: Mitten in Nightlife
reviews.text: Liegt in einer Seitenstrasse der Ausgangsmeile. Touren konnten problemlos gebucht werden, Mofamiete möglich. Manchmal niemand an Reception, manchmal niemand der englisch spricht. Dreckiger Teppich in Zimmer. Momentan Fensterzimmer auf Baustelle.

reviews.title: Mitten im lebhaften Quartier
reviews.text:
•Lage: sehr zentral mitten in der Old Quarter in der Gasse versteckt - überall zu Fuss zu erreichen 
•vom Flughafen Hanoi direkt mit öV Bus Nr. 86 für 45000VND (!) - 7 Haltestellen ca. 45min / Bus fährt ca. alle 15/20 min ca. 05:30-21:30
•Zimmer: mit eigener Dusche und WC; nicht sehr gross,  aber toll!!!😊 
•Badetuch, Shampoo, Duschgel, Fön, Wasserkocher, kleiner Minibar-Kühlschrank (ohne Waren), Fernseher vorhanden
•Zimmer mit Klimaanlage und(!) Ventilator - mit Geräusche, aber kühlt und ok!
•WC ja kein WC-Papier reinwerfen; sonst stopft es! (Pumpe im Warenzimmer im Zwischenstock)
•jeder Stock mit (1-)2 Zimmer
•Hotel ohne Lift (5-6 Stockwerke?) ich war im 4. Stock, und es geht noch hoch
•Umgebung gute Restaurants und einheimische Einwohner 
•2 Lokal-Märkte zu Fuss erreichbar
•Personal sehr freundlich und nett
•für den Preis = Top, zu gut!

reviews.title: Stay in Hanoi
reviews.text: I arrived in the middle of the night and it was no problem to check in after the regular check in times. The service were really nice and my room was really comfortable.

1 voordeel is de locatie, midden in old quarter.

reviews.title: ただ寝るだけなら…
reviews.text: 色々と書きたいことはあるが、まあ安いから寝るだけなら一晩くらいは我慢できるだろう。もちろんホステルよりはプライバシーを確保できるから、それでいいなら。

reviews.title: 評価
reviews.text: 安いのでヨシ

reviews.title: 安い！ただそれだけ
reviews.text: 口コミを見て、低層階を予約したのに、まさかの最上階。修行のような階段です。　路地裏で、ティッシュなし、Wi-Fi弱し。　でも安い

reviews.title: 静かなお手頃ホテル
reviews.text: 細い通りを入った所にあるので静かに過ごせます、料金もお手頃です。

reviews.title: ロケーション抜群
reviews.text:
2泊しました。
ロケーションは抜群で、旧市街のど真ん中、どこに何しに行くにも便利です。
エレベーターがないので、3階以上に宿泊される方は、ちょっと上り下りがきつくなります。

ベッドメイキングはありませんでした。スタッフもフレンドリーで、対応も早かったです。

価格もリーズナブルなので、豪華さを求めず、利便性とコスパを追求するなら、ぜひおすすめの宿です。
多分ですが、日本人宿泊者は、私だけだったと思います。欧米系の方が多かったように思います。

reviews.title: 宿について
reviews.text:
ロケーションは最高
あとは値段の通り

シャワーの出
残念

reviews.title: 立地が最高でリーズナブル
reviews.text:
部屋は狭めで古さを感じるが旧市街地のどこにでも出掛けやすくてよかった。
バルコニーもあってよかった。
宿にランドリーサービスはなかったが近くにあった

reviews.title: 選択サービス
reviews.text:
選択サービスがとてもよかったです！
スタッフさんがゆるくて優しくて最高でした！

reviews.title: 숙소를 다른곳으로 이동
reviews.text: 숙소에 도착하니 아고다로 예약된것이 없다고하면서 모르겠다고 합니다.베트남말하는 사람연결해서 말하니 여기말고 다른곳에 방을준다고 하네요 그곳은 아주  허름한곳이고 전기가 계속 안들어와서 힘들었네요

reviews.title: 가격만금의 품질
reviews.text: 간판이 자주 바뀌는걸로 보아 평이 않좋긴 한가봅니다. 위생상태는 역시나 않좋고 직원은 아침까지 소파에 누워 자고 있습니다.

reviews.title: 위치빼고 대체적으로 불만족

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: 太久了
reviews.text: 开了房间是***，实际五楼只有两个房间，***是六楼，没有电梯，扛着行李来回，又旧又小，还贵，非常不推荐，住了当天都想回国了

reviews.title: 与图片不符

reviews.title: סביר מינוס
reviews.text:
מקום לשים את הראש בלבד, וגם זה בתנאי שיש לכם ליינר.
נמצא בסמטה מסריחה, החדר מרווח אבל מלוכלך- המצעים והמגבות לא נקיים. הזרם במקלחת חלש. 
לא ממליצה אלא אם בא לכם לחסוך ומוכנים להתפשר על ניקיון

reviews.title: Above average

המלון נמצא במיקום מעולה והצוות חמוד
אבל החדר היה מגעיל ולא נקי . מצעים מגעילים לא היו מגבות 
לא היה בחדר כמעט כלום 
המקלחת מעל השירותים
לא מומלץ

reviews.title: Just for sleep
reviews.text: No that clean, not a pretty room but if you just want to sleep for a few hours is okay. Central location

reviews.title: Helt ok boende
reviews.text: Vi behövde snabbt ett rum och bokade det lilla rummet längst upp. Det var inget trevligt rum att bo i. Så nästa natt bokade vi familjerummet med balkong och två stora sängar och blev nöjda. Vi träffade inga andra resenärer vilket var synd eftersom det inte ledde till några resetips. Vår receptionist var en trevlig ung man men tyvärr var hans engelska inte den bästa.  Han påpekade mycket ärligt att vi betalt dubbelt för rummet, både via Agoda och kontant, vilket hedrar honom. Läget på hotellet är däremot bra, mitt i smeten, vid en lugn bakgata så vi blev inte störda av nattlivet.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice

reviews.title: Nie polecam
reviews.text: Hotel na przetrwanie do następnego dnia

reviews.title: Recomended
reviews.text: The hotel is well located, but a bit difficult to find in a side street.  Rooms small but clean.  Nice staff.  At this price, recommendable.  Attention.  There is no elevator in the hotel.

reviews.title: Disappointment
reviews.text: Despite the hotel's excellent location, it is very poorly maintained. There is a problem with overheating. The refrigerator and kettle are not clean. Photos of the filters are posted online.The address listed on the website does not match the actual address. You must contact the hotel to confirm the address. Don't try to find the address with your luggage.

reviews.title: 旅遊住宿
reviews.text: 房間整潔地點佳，沒有電梯

reviews.title: Budget stay in a good location
reviews.text: Room was okay. More like a 1 star hotel than 3 star. Stayed 3 days. No toilet paper in the room and hot water didn’t work. Bed and sheets were clean. Location was good and relatively quiet at night.

reviews.title: 2hr experience
reviews.text: I made a last-minute booking at this hotel due to my original choice being fully booked. It served as a quick stopover before catching a sleeper bus to Sapa. I can't comment on the overnight stay, but in terms of value for money, I have no complaints. The hotel is tucked away in an alley where cars can't enter, but it's conveniently close to the central area of the old quarter.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Hotel muito bem localizado, no meio do old quarter. Muitos restaurantes em volta. Apesar do old quarter ser muito agitado, o hotel fica em uma rua bem tranquila, onde o barulho não chega.

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: The staff are amazing, the location very good, all perfect! They help me to. The transfer to the AirPort, Amazing experience
